title: Lukas' Weapon Leveling Transfer
description: Support mod for Lukas' Weapon Leveling. You can transfer weapon's levels in Anvil
body:
You **MUST** have [https://modrinth.com/mod/weapon-leveling](https://modrinth.com/mod/weapon-leveling) for the mod to work

A mod of my [Easycraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/easycraftofficial) modpack <3

**Both of the items in the Anvil must have at least Level 1 or Progress > 0 in order to transfer, and full durability**
